clangFormat.description: clang-format options using clang-format YAML option names represented as JSON. Unknown or invalid options are reported by clang-format during dprint configuration resolution.

BasedOnStyle.description: Predefined clang-format base style. Filesystem-dependent values such as file and InheritParentConfig are not supported in the sandboxed Wasm plugin.

clangFormatValue.description: A JSON representation of a clang-format YAML scalar, sequence, or mapping.
